title: mapania costata
intro: Mapania costata, also known as the River Tangle, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
